bead.title: agent: retire ExecuteBeadLoopOptions + Run legacy method
bead.description:
Stage 1 of SD-024 cleanup. Removes the legacy ExecuteBeadLoopOptions struct and ExecuteBeadWorker.Run method now that all callers use ExecuteBeadLoopRuntime + RunWithConfig.

In-scope:
- cli/internal/agent/execute_bead_loop.go — delete ExecuteBeadLoopOptions struct, delete Run method, rename RunWithConfig to Run
- Any transitional shims introduced in beads 6, 11a-15b

Out-of-scope:
- RunOptions / ExecuteBeadOptions retirement (Stages 2/3)
bead.acceptance: rg 'type ExecuteBeadLoopOptions ' cli/ returns 0 matches. rg 'ExecuteBeadLoopOptions' cli/ returns 0 matches. cd cli && go build ./... passes. cd cli && go test ./... passes.
